inputs.label: Observed Time (OT)
inputs.businessContext: Average observed time per cycle from time study

inputs.label: Rating Factor
inputs.businessContext: Performance rating to adjust pace (100% = normal)

inputs.label: Allowance Factor
inputs.businessContext: Allowance for personal, fatigue, delays (percentage of normal time)

inputs.label: Number of Cycles Observed
inputs.businessContext: Number of cycles timed to compute average; used for standard deviation

inputs.label: Standard Deviation of Observed Times
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of the observed cycle times (minutes)

inputs.label: Z-score for Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Standard normal deviate for desired confidence (e.g., 1.96 for 95%)
